column1: These are my sisters. ________ names are Mary and Dina.
These are my parents. _________ names are Tanya and Bob.
I have a brother. You can see _____ brother in the picture.
We have got a house. ____ house is big.
She has got  2 little cats. They are _____ cats..
He has got a bag. It's __________ bag.
You have got a ball. Give me  ______ ball.
We haven't got a dog. This is not __________ dog.
Do you have a game? Is this ______ game?
